messages.body: I found the founder interview reel in the cold shelves. I'm bringing the original upstairs after the late segment instead of the clipped transcript.
Do not carry original archive media into the board room. We only need the written summary for the sale vote.
If the board doesn't hear Halden tonight, do I still cue the toast after the vote?
Not until they hear his own words. The summary Jonas circulated leaves out the trust clause.
This was supposed to be a celebration, not a boardroom ambush.
